articles.title: Cardano NFTs grow from strength to strength – enough to flip Ethereum and Solana?
articles.description: The NFT bear market may have offered other blockchains a chance to compete with the stakeholders. Cardano NFTs seem to be leading this charge.

articles.title: How This Early PEPE Buyer Turned $260 Into Almost $8 Million Amid Meme Coin Frenzy
articles.description: Pepe (PEPE), the token which sprouted out of the "Pepe the Frog" meme and went live a little over two weeks ago, has already minted many millionaires overnight.

articles.title: Pepe Coin Goes Berserk With 1,500% Rally As Memecoin Seen Soaring Higher
articles.description: PEPE, the frog-themed cryptocurrency, has hopped its way to the forefront of the crypto world with a staggering 1,500% surge in just two weeks. As investors and enthusiasts alike scramble to get their hands on the memecoin, Pepe has secured a spot among the top 50 coins by market cap, surpassing the billion-dollar milestone in […]

articles.title: Bitcoin Transaction Fees Surge to 2-year Highs – Where Next for the BTC Price?
articles.description: The mean fee to conduct a transaction on the Bitcoin network just shot to its highest level in nearly two years, as per data presented by crypto on-chain analytics firm Glassnode. On Friday, the average transaction fee clocked in at 0.00032814 BTC, up more than ten-fold from a dip to 0.00003161 on the 23rd of April. At the current Bitcoin price of around $29,600, that implies a...

articles.title: Solana’s latest surge can kickoff a bullish wave — will SOL get up to speed?
articles.description: Solana's overall activity surged over the last 24 hours. The protocol also witnessed improvements in the DeFi space as stablecoin growth increases.
